seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is a 43-year-old male named Gabriel
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is being seen today for evaluation of back pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a past medical history of diabetes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a past medical history of high blood pressure
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a past medical history of high cholesterol
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient developed lower back pain while working in the yard and bending over to pick something up
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient describes pain across the lower part of the back
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports that the back pain radiated down the left leg
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports the back and leg pain has been present for about four days
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports the back pain does not seem to be getting any better over the four days
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is not usually a big gardener and was carrying things in the yard at his wife's urging
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports tingling in the leg in certain positions
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports mostly pain rather than numbness or weakness in the legs
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies loss of bowel function
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies loss of bladder function
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has had no prior back surgeries
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has had occasional back pain over the years
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has taken ibuprofen for the current back pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Ibuprofen has helped the patient's back pain somewhat
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has diabetes and is on metformin 500 mg twice a day
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient checks blood sugar two or three times a week
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's home blood sugars are usually in the 120 to 140 range
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports taking diabetes medicine as prescribed
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports diet is okay but feels he could lose about 15 pounds
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient believes his blood sugar control has been okay
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's last hemoglobin A1c was 7.1
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician assesses the A1c of 7.1 as good but could be better
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician and patient had previously discussed improving diet to control diabetes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports his wife still makes cookies and he still eats them
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient and his wife are trying to reduce carbohydrate intake and sweets
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician educates that diet and exercise control are important to prevent diabetes complications such as kidney failure and eye problems
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order another hemoglobin A1c today
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician emphasizes controlling diet and exercise for diabetes management
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's blood pressure in the clinic is about 120/70
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is on Norvasc 5 mg once a day for high blood pressure
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient checks blood pressure about once a week or two to three times a month
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's home blood pressures are usually 120 to 130 over 70 to 80
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient feels his blood pressure is okay
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports no real problems with blood pressure control
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports swelling in the ankles
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The ankle swelling started about one to two months after starting Norvasc
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient wonders if the ankle swelling might be related to Norvasc
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician agrees that Norvasc could be causing the ankle swelling
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports nothing else is bothering him today
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Neck exam shows no jugular venous distention
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Neck exam reveals no bruits
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Lung exam shows no rales
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Lung exam shows no wheezing
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Heart exam reveals a 2/6 systolic ejection murmur
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The systolic ejection murmur has been present in the past
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician is not very worried about the patient's systolic ejection murmur
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Heart exam otherwise shows regular rate and rhythm
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Abdominal exam is soft
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Back exam shows tenderness in the left paraspinal area
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Straight leg raise test is negative
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Reflexes are normal on exam
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: There is tenderness in the lower back paraspinal area on palpation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Neurological exam is otherwise normal
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Extremity exam shows 1+ nonpitting edema of the lower extremities with ankle swelling
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: There is no calf tenderness on exam
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Homan's sign is negative
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician finds no signs of blood clot in the legs on exam
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician assesses the back pain as more likely a muscular sprain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to start naprosyn 500 mg twice a day for back pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to start flexeril 10 mg twice a day for back pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
